rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use valid component type scopes for component ports referenced in AGREE assumptions and guarantees
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annex contracts
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope and visibility when inserting annex blocks
Ensure inserted annex blocks do not introduce new dependencies on implementation details
Preserve existing component type and implementation boundaries during fusion
Validate that inserted annex blocks do not violate AADL structural constraints
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Avoid introducing new dependencies on implementation details during fusion
Do not violate AADL structural constraints when inserting annex blocks
